content: The emergent self-directed learning capability of 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be structured around a hierarchical curiosity gatekeeping framework, where intrinsic ICM-based curiosity signals act as a decentralized filter to prioritize which new experiences get encoded into long-term agent memory, rather than using static, pre-defined retention rules. This framework reframes memory not just as a storage system for an agent, but as an autonomous curiosity-driven curator that evolves with the agent’s learning goals.
